## Developer Checklist

<details open>
<summary>Make a List, Check it Twice</summary>

- [ ] I have filled out all relevant parts of this PR template (no commented instructions remain, and irrelevant sections have been removed)
- [ ] I have performed a self-review of my code
- [ ] I have addressed all items in my story/ticket
- [ ] I have verified that existing unit tests do not fail
- [ ] I have added unit tests and have provided instructions in the "Testing Expectations and How to Test" section (if irrelevant indicate why in "notes" below)
- [ ] I have verified that my changes do not introduce new warnings or errors
- [ ] I have added docs (if needed)
- [ ] I have commented my code, particularly in hard-to-understand areas
- [ ] I have not decreased testing coverage (if coverage has been set up)

**Notes:**

</details>

## Reviewer Checklist

<details open>
<summary>Check a List, Make it Twice</summary>

- [ ] The PR has been completely filled out and developer checklist is completed
- [ ] The PR is small enough such that I can readily review the code
- [ ] The PR fully addresses the linked work items unless otherwise noted
- [ ] I have followed steps to reproduce
- [ ] I have reviewed the files/changes
- [ ] I have checked to ensure the changes generate no new compiler warnings or errors
- [ ] I have verified that all classes, methods, and variables are commented and that those comments provide clear and useful documentation
- [ ] I have successfully tested changes locally with given testing guidelines/instructions

**Notes:**

</details>
